design_philosophy: Color is Function Only. Stark, minimalist interface emphasizing clear hierarchy and data density. Maximum readability through high contrast and stark boundaries.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use standard Tailwind scale but generous padding in structural containers (e.g., p-8) to emphasize negative space.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (Dense, Data-heavy). Expose the skeleton, make the grid visible via border-collapse style layout.
layout_and_spacing.borders: border-black border-[1px] or border-[2px] for major structural elements
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Grid Borders: expose the skeleton. Cardless design, high contrast container outlines.

components.cards: Cardless design. Use rectangular div with 1px or 2px black border, solid white background, zero border radius.

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white border-2 border-[#002FA7] hover:bg-black hover:border-black rounded-none transition-colors px-6 py-2 font-medium tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-black border-2 border-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white rounded-none transition-colors px-6 py-2 font-medium tracking-wide
buttons.danger: bg-white text-[#E32636] border-2 border-[#E32636] hover:bg-[#E32636] hover:text-white rounded-none px-6 py-2 font-medium tracking-wide

components.inputs: bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#002FA7] focus:outline-none p-3 text-base
components.tables: w-full border-collapse border-2 border-black. th: border-b-2 border-black uppercase text-xs tracking-[0.1em] font-bold p-4 text-left. td: border-b border-black/10 p-4 align-top.
components.navigation: Header must have solid background. Side nav with 2px black border separating it from main content. Active links bold with a black left border indicator.
rules: DO NOT use HTML-based components for advanced user interactions.
Use Shadcn calendar for date pickers (NOT HTML input type='date').
Use Recharts or Shadcn charts if data visualization is needed.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Hard background color inversions or striking color shifts. Text color MUST explicitly be set on hover to ensure contrast.

icons.style: bold or fill for strong geometric presence

login_hero.description: Minimalist Swiss poster style abstract geometric composition for the login page hero section.
login_hero.usage: Use as a full-height visual on the left or right side of a split login screen.

specific_pages.staff_dashboard: Dense table view. Use square color blocks (Red/Yellow/Black) for attendance status in the calendar/table view, rather than soft colored pills.
specific_pages.salary_calculator: Clear typographic hierarchy. Bold prominent text for the final calculated 'Monthly Salary' figure, styled almost like an invoice.
specific_pages.whats_new: A slide-over sheet or modal with stark typography, list items separated by solid 1px black borders.

testing.data_testid: All interactive elements MUST include a descriptive data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., 'login-submit-button', 'staff-table-row', 'mark-present-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the JSON media assets strictly. Do not use random placeholder links.
Implement the font pairs: Chivo for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body.
Ensure the UI elements look brutalist, high-contrast, structural, and 'Swiss'. This means sharp 0px border radius, clear dark borders, thick lines, dense grids.
Emphasize the layout using grid and flex, without relying on standard soft shadow cards.
